title: Ski Slopes (Snow)
description: Adds 3 types of snow slopes as an addon for winter sport/ski mods and builds.
body:
**Ski Slopes!**

 

This mod adds 3 types of snow slope blocks into the game and aims for better ski area builds and can be used as an addon for winter sport mods such as: Snowy Spirit or Skiing2.

Slopes added:

- Ski Slope (Main)
- Ski Slope Flat (upper)
- Ski Slope Flat (lower)

  upper and lower combined = one smooth slope.

The slopes are survival friendly, can be crafted by using snowballs (as seen in images) and are fully mineable again.

- As of right now, only 1.20.1 Forge, no Fabric port planned or newer versions (due to Skiing2 only be available for 1.20.1 Forge as well.)
